products.name: Classic Eames High Back-Cushion
products.description:
Classic Eames high back with cushion specifications:

Tortion tilt mechanism with stabilizing bar for extra strength
Gas height adjustment
Stylish chrome arms
Chrome pyramid base
Max user weight: 130kg
features: A variation of the Classic Eames high back chair including more cushioning, maximizing comfort with a minimalistic appearance. Adds a touch of class to any modern office or boardroom.
